description: CompositionBlue and pink sleeveless printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with a split neckline, pintucks at the shoulder that flare at the waist and an embroidered yokeFitRegularWash careHand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleedFlat dry inside out in shadeWarm ironThe inspiration for this kurta from aneri is the retro-esque fusion of the uniquely ethnic with smart workwear. The modern Indian working woman has come into her own, as has her wardrobe. This piece epitomises how fashion, vintage styling and comfort unite to create the perfect Indian tunic. For those who want to keep their look classic and chic, pair this with tonal leggings and embellished sandals. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
